summary: Continued the TUI alignment work rather than stopping: wired chat rendering through the OpenClaude-style root lifecycle by switching `claude-style-chat.tsx` from direct `render()` to `createRoot()` + `renderAndRun()`, added `src/interactiveHelpers.tsx` (showDialog/exitWithMessage/renderAndRun), and added `src/types/command.ts` with `local-jsx` command contracts to match the prompt’s command model surface. Also hardened `chatCommand` with a themed fatal-error path using `exitWithMessage` so startup failures are rendered in-TUI instead of raw console output.
current_status: TUI architecture now includes themed facade (`src/ink.ts`), theme provider + themed primitives, piped-stdin render options, root lifecycle helpers, and local-jsx command type contracts; build and tests are passing. Full OpenClaude runtime parity (e.g., complete slash-command execution pipeline and full previous chat/WebUI orchestration semantics) is still pending if you want a 1:1 clone.
